name: Parmesan Breaded Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine spices, bread crumbs, and cheese in a shallow bowl.
3. Dip chicken pieces in the buttermilk, then in the crumb mixture.
4. Lightly coat a baking pan with oil.
5. Place chicken, bone side down, on the pan.
6. Bake, covered, for 25 minutes or until done.
7. Serves four. Per serving: 277 calories, 23% fat - 7 gm fat.
